title: The concept of functional cure in advanced/metastatic melanoma treated with combined nivolumab and ipilimumab or nivolumab alone.
abstract: Immune-Checkpoint-Inhibitors (ICIs) have significantly improved the course of advanced/metastatic melanoma and the concept of ICIs curative potential began to appear. To use statistical approaches to determine whether advanced/metastatic melanoma patients treated with nivolumab alone or in combination with ipilimumab may be considered as functionally cured.
trial_name: Combined nivolumab and ipilimumab with or without SBRT for advanced Merkel cell carcinoma
